domain: Tahitian heiva ote'a+aparima dual dance (Polynesia French Polynesia; ote'a fast hip-shaking percussion + aparima slower narrative hand gestures; months rehearsal; judged on technique+theme; speed-precision dual discipline)
specific_mechanism: Phase-interleaved dual-track training schedule: TRACK-A = precision-track (SFT on golden references with slow controlled gradient steps), TRACK-B = speed-track (on-policy RL with latency/throughput reward). The two tracks alternate per epoch with synchronized assessment endpoints; checkpoints from both tracks are MERGED via task-arithmetic interpolation before each assessment.
llm_application: HEIVA-DUAL-TRACK: a phase-interleaved dual-track training schedule. (1) Define two parallel branches A=precision-SFT, B=speed-RL-on-policy with respectively low and high learning rates and latency/throughput reward; (2) at epoch E run TRACK-A; at epoch E+1 run TRACK-B; (3) every 4 epochs MERGE checkpoints via task-arithmetic θ_merged = α·θ_A + (1-α)·θ_B with α tuned on validation; (4) assess on combined precision+speed benchmark at each merge endpoint. Differs from MOPD multi-teacher distillation (parallel teachers averaging, not phase-interleaved tracks), On-Policy Distillation Thinking Machines (combined RL+distillation reward at single track, not interleaved), KD Survey (catalog of distillation methods), Teacher-Student Distillation (single-track). Differs from R407 WANDJINA (surgical FT), R410 FAMADIHANA (periodic checkpoint refresh single-track), R432 SONGLINE (waypoint-graph curriculum single-track).
novelty_claim: Multi-stage SFT+RL+distillation training pipelines + task arithmetic merging are well-covered. HEIVA-DUAL-TRACK adds (a) EXPLICIT precision-speed dual-track parallel + (b) phase-interleaved alternation + (c) task-arithmetic merge endpoints. Recombination.
